productDisplayName: Skechers Men Zeta Brown Casual Shoes
description: Sporty and stylish, the skechers Planfix-Zeta is perfect for those casual days. Team this sneaker with jeans and semi-formal t-shirts to work or simply wear it on casual occasions.UpperSmooth leather upper with overlay for durability, comfort and styleLeather overlays on front, sides and heelStitching accents with zig-zag stitch detailing on heel overlay for durability and styleContrast coloured side stripes with stitch detailing for added shoe structureEmbossed logo on heelLace-up system with metallic eyelets for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for in-step comfortSoft fabric shoe lining for all-day comfortMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortRelaxed step comfort insole for superior supportCushioned midsole with shock absorption technology for durability and impact protectionRetro vulcanised rubber midsole for a classic lookOutsoleFlexible rubber traction outsole with multi-directional grooves and lugs for stability and supportTextured toe bumper and midsole stripe for durabilityShoe careWipe surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
